title: The Bed
director: Henri Decoin, Jean Delannoy, Gianni Franciolini
writer: Sergio Amidei, Paul Andréota, Maurice Aubergé
actors: Jeanne Moreau, Richard Todd, Dawn Addams
plot: Four-episode Franco-Italian omnibus film. Four men from different national and cultural background take refuge in a cabin after being sidetracked by bad weather on their way to conference.
